Description.DefaultValue: Local development build of Jolify for PowerPoint.

bt:String.DefaultValue: Copy position and size from the first selected shape.
Paste saved position and size to all selected shapes.
Copy position (left, top) from the first selected shape.
Paste saved position to all selected shapes.
Copy size (width, height) from the first selected shape.
Paste saved size to all selected shapes.
Swap the positions of exactly two selected shapes.
Copy outline style from the first shape to the rest.
Copy fill style from the first shape to the rest.
Match height of selected shapes to the first shape.
Match width of selected shapes to the first shape.
Match height and width of selected shapes to the first shape.
Align selected shapes to the leftmost edge.
Align selected shapes to the rightmost edge.
Align selected shapes to the topmost edge.
Align selected shapes to the bottommost edge.
Distribute selected shapes evenly in horizontal space.
Distribute selected shapes evenly in vertical space.
Split a text box into one box per line.
Set all text margins to zero for the selected text boxes.
Turn off text autofit for the selected text boxes.
Create a centered square text box with placeholder text and sticker formatting.
Add the DRAFT sticker to all slides, or remove it if the deck already has one.
Merge selected text boxes into one.
Center shapes horizontally then group them.
Center shapes vertically then group them.
Center shapes on both axes then group them.
Distribute shapes horizontally then group them.
Distribute shapes vertically then group them.
Copy fill and outline from the first shape to the rest.
Remove the fill from the selected shape or shapes.
Remove the outline from the selected shape or shapes.
Open the grid builder dialog to create a shape grid.
Move selected slides to an Unused section.
Open a dialog to create a new presentation from the selected slides.
